title: Wan Ren Zhi Shang
synopsis:
Yi Feng transmigrates to the Immortal River Continent. Born without spiritual roots, he can only barely survive using the "essential life skills" bestowed upon him by the system. Unbeknownst to him, in the eyes of other cultivators, his strength is already god-like, and his every move affects the entire Immortal River Continent. Unaware of his surroundings, Yi Feng skillfully resolves numerous crises, bringing many exciting and hilarious scenes, and offering new opportunities and choices to the people living on this continent.

(Source: iQIYI YouTube Channel)
